GENERAL-001.description: Fallback rule id for results emitted without an explicit rule.

STRUCT-001.description: Required project file or directory is missing.

PLACEHOLDER-001.description: Placeholder, TODO, or TBD remains at release gate.

SOURCE-002.description: Source Snapshot is missing or does not show sync time.

SOURCE-LINK-001.description: Broken links in user-owned source files are informational or warning only.

REF-001.description: Requirement, source, design, decision, or release references do not resolve.

ENUM-001.description: Work item mode, status, review stage, or evidence enum is invalid.

EVIDENCE-001.description: Requirement is missing evidence status or uses an invalid evidence status.

MODE-001.description: Requested mode cannot downgrade the effective mode (FAIL at Release, WARN otherwise).

MODE-002.description: PROJECT.md declares an unrecognized default mode.

MODE-003.description: Strict escalation triggered by a work item's strict trigger.

APPROVAL-001.description: Approval row is missing or incomplete.

APPROVAL-002.description: Approval contains placeholder, invalid date, missing role, or unresolvable evidence (WARN_BLOCKING for Lite free-text evidence).

APPROVAL-003.description: Approver role is not in the allowed role matrix (WARN_BLOCKING at Standard, FAIL at Strict).

TASK-001.description: Task source of truth is missing or invalid.

TASK-002.description: PROJECT.md and DELIVERY.md task source of truth conflict.

TASK-003.description: GitHub task source: DELIVERY.md absent, work-item board not verifiable offline (non-blocking).

WORKITEM-001.description: Work item is missing required governance fields or the header contract.

STRICT-001.description: Strict trigger exists but work item is not Strict.

STRICT-002.description: Strict release is missing RTM, RAID, or decision-log guardrails.

BLOCKER-001.description: Open blocker exists during release validation.

RELEASE-001.description: Release rollback plan is missing, unstructured, or has an invalid Lite waiver.

RELEASE-STATUS-001.description: A release-scope work item is not Done.

RELEASE-SCOPE-001.description: A work item is not listed in the Release Scope table, or is excluded without a reason.

REVIEW-001.description: A release-scope work item (Standard/Strict) has no review stage.

TEST-RESULT-001.description: A Test Summary row is not passed (or skipped without a reason; Strict also requires resolvable skip evidence).

TEST-SUMMARY-001.description: Standard/Strict Release has no Test Summary row and no valid test_required:false waiver, or (Strict) every row is skipped.

TEST-EVIDENCE-001.description: A release-scope work item's test checklist or evidence is missing or unresolvable (WARN_BLOCKING for Lite).

TEST-EVIDENCE-002.description: A passed Test Summary row has missing or unresolvable evidence.

QA-REVIEW-001.description: QA review row is missing or invalid at Release (Standard/Strict).

SECURITY-REVIEW-001.description: Security review row is missing or invalid at Strict Release.

RTM-001.description: Strict RTM.json is empty, invalid, or missing schema_version/traceability.

RTM-002.description: RTM is missing a requirement declared in PROJECT.md.

RTM-003.description: RTM row has a broken delivery_ref.

RTM-004.description: RTM row has a broken test_ref.

RTM-005.description: RTM row has a missing or unresolvable evidence_ref.

RTM-006.description: RTM row has a broken release_ref.

RTM-007.description: RTM row is an orphan or duplicate (requirement not in PROJECT.md, or repeated).

RTM-008.description: RTM row has a missing or malformed source_ref.

RTM-009.description: RTM row design_ref does not resolve to an existing design file.

RTM-010.description: RTM row has an invalid status (not an evidence-status enum value).

SENSITIVE-001.description: Potential sensitive file detected by pre-check.

DOCTOR-000.description: Fallback rule id for framework doctor results, and broken doctor-scanned local links.

DOCTOR-001.description: Active skill runtime does not match skill manifest.

DOCTOR-003.description: Context map does not reference JSON runtime config.

DOCTOR-004.description: Active skill contains legacy rule references.

DOCTOR-005.description: Version metadata is inconsistent across VERSION, CHANGELOG, and config.

DOCTOR-006.description: A pmo-config/*.json file is missing or has an unsupported schema_version.

DOCTOR-007.description: A runtime rule id is missing from this catalog, or a catalog entry is never emitted.

DOCTOR-STRUCT.description: A required framework structural file or directory is missing.

DOCTOR-EXAMPLE.description: A required example project is missing.

DOCTOR-HOOK.description: Fake PMO echo hooks still exist in settings.

DOCTOR-SKILL-001.description: Active skill SKILL.md frontmatter is missing, incomplete, or mismatched.

TABLE-001.description: Markdown table column counts do not match the header.

PERMISSION-001.description: Dangerous git mutation is allowed by default.

PERMISSION-002.description: A required allowlisted framework command is not permitted.

PERMISSION-003.description: git commit/push/tag is not gated behind an ask rule.

PERMISSION-004.description: Common secret and private-key paths are not denied.

PERMISSION-006.description: External web search requires human approval.

PERMISSION-007.description: Sensitive ignore patterns are too broad, stale, or missing.
